## Epic 3 — Skills & Talents (#35)

**Dependency:** #30, #31, #32, #33
**Est. Effort:** Large

### Goal
Write chapter 07 — Skills as a complete reference chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Skill Overview** — What skills are and how they work
2. **Skill List** — Full list with attribute associations, dice prerequisites, descriptions
3. **Skill Tiers** — Novice (+1), Adept (+2), Master (+3) explained
4. **Purchasing Skills** — DP costs, class cost matrix
5. **Using Skills** — When to roll, difficulty, opposed checks
6. **Skill Descriptions** — 2-3 paragraphs per skill with examples
7. **Worked Examples** — Skill checks in play (combat, social, exploration)

### Success Criteria
- All 18-25 skills have full descriptions
- Class DP cost matrix is included
- At least 3 worked examples
- Builds without AsciiDoc errors

### Tasks
- [ ] Write skill overview and tier rules
- [ ] Write each skill description
- [ ] Include class DP cost matrix table
- [ ] Write worked examples
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: attributes (ch03), classes (ch05), dice types (ch08)
